commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch shares UI/backend session-key resolution helpers, uses `chat.history` metadata for startup hydration, defers chat-tab model auth refresh, and updates TUI/gateway/UI coverage.

PR surface: Source -45, Tests +92. Total +47 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the PR helper now defaults unknown selected-global state to `main`, while current tests and controller code define the expected no-`agentId` behavior until a selected/default agent is known; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Queue a narrow repair because the blocker is a mechanical split between selected-global request resolution and default-main list hydration, with clear regression tests.

target.title: perf: streamline chat startup metadata
target.body:
## Summary

- Share UI session-key/default resolution helpers across chat, session controller, gateway state, and run lifecycle paths so startup hydration uses one alias-matching contract.
- Reuse the backend request-key matcher for TUI reset/session rows instead of re-parsing each row locally.
- Defer chat-tab model auth status refresh until after chat history/render scheduling, and add gateway metadata coverage for startup hydration without a follow-up sessions.list call.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/routing/session-key.test.ts src/tui/tui-session-actions.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/run-lifecycle.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-settings.refresh-active-tab.node.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/session-key.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/sessions.ts ui/src/ui/chat/run-lifecycle.ts ui/src/ui/app-settings.ts src/routing/session-key.ts src/routing/session-key.test.ts src/tui/tui-session-actions.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:src`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `pnpm ui:build`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run -provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` - Testbox `tbx_01kt05hrqx9vfvyr67h29kbks9`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26727467869
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Faster startup after `/new` and `/reset` by keeping startup hydration on chat.history metadata and avoiding the extra sessions.list path in the web/TUI startup cases tested.

Real environment tested: Local gateway watch, authenticated Control UI in isolated Chrome, and local TUI in tmux against the same checkout/binary.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Built the Control UI, restarted gateway watch, opened `/chat?session=main` through browser automation, captured RPC methods/timings from the app event stream, then ran `pnpm tui` in tmux and exercised `/new` and `/reset`.

Evidence after fix: Web startup RPCs included `chat.history`, `models.list`, `commands.list`, and deferred `models.authStatus`; no `sessions.list` was observed. TUI `/new` switched locally without a gateway RPC, and `/reset` produced one `sessions.reset` RPC with no history/list follow-up.

Observed result after fix: In the measured run, web `chat.history` completed in 778ms; TUI `/reset` completed with one `sessions.reset` call in 605ms. The observed gateway-watch CPU profile still points at state DB/session store/plugin alias startup costs, not new work in this diff.

What was not tested: Full release packaging and cross-OS live UI proof.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
